scripts.build: npm run build -w @worlddesc/world && npm run build -w @worlddesc/llm-runner && npm run build -w @worlddesc/web-ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @worlddesc/world && npm run typecheck -w @worlddesc/llm-runner && npm run typecheck -w @worlddesc/web-ui
scripts.test: npm run test -w @worlddesc/world && npm run test -w @worlddesc/llm-runner
scripts.llm:repl: npm run build -w @worlddesc/world && npm run build -w @worlddesc/llm-runner && node ./packages/llm-runner/dist/cli.js
scripts.llm:web: npm run build -w @worlddesc/world && npm run build -w @worlddesc/llm-runner && npm run build -w @worlddesc/web-ui && node ./packages/llm-runner/dist/cli.js --web --web-ui-dist ./packages/web-ui/dist
scripts.llm:web:api: npm run build -w @worlddesc/world && npm run build -w @worlddesc/llm-runner && node ./packages/llm-runner/dist/cli.js --web
